name: Onetimesecret
tagline: Share sensitive information securely with self-destructing links that are only viewable once.
description:
Share sensitive information securely with self-destructing links that are only viewable once.

Docs: https://docs.onetimesecret.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  onetimesecret:
    image: onetimesecret/onetimesecret:latest
    environment:
      - AUTH_AUTOVERIFY=${AUTH_AUTOVERIFY:-true}
      - AUTH_SIGNUP=${AUTH_SIGNUP:-true}
      - COLONEL=${COLONEL:-admin@example.com}
      - HOST=${HOST:-localhost}
      - REDIS_URL=redis://:03994d86e90fae8a9ae7c0924f372b7b@redis:6379/0
      - SECRET=9f51ac13198815bc815983750c1d344b
      - SSL=${SSL:-false}
      - RACK_ENV=production
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - ruby
        - -rnet/http
        - -e
        - 'exit(Net::HTTP.get_response(URI(''http://localhost:3000'')).is_a?(Net::HTTPSuccess) ? 0 : 1)'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42087:3000
  redis:
    image: redis:8-alpine
    command: redis-server --requirepass 03994d86e90fae8a9ae7c0924f372b7b
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - ping
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
